rationale: Educ. Code §45.035 governs refunding of revenue bonds and has no operative relationship to the Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amount. No conflict arises from the proposed change.
quote: Sec. 45.035. REFUNDING BONDS. Revenue bonds issued by a board, city council or commission, or commissioners court under this subchapter and revenue bonds issued by a board, city council or commission, or commissioners court under other law and payable from revenues from facilities described by Section 45.031 may be refunded or otherwise refinanced by the board, city council or commission, or commissioners court, and in that case all appropriate provisions of this subchapter apply to the refunding bonds.
_note: No conflict detected. The cited rule concerns bond refunding mechanics and does not reference homestead exemptions or property tax appraisal values.
